nasb.text: All the utensils of the tabernacle used in all its service, and all its pegs, and all the pegs of the court, shall be of bronze.

esv.text: All the utensils of the tabernacle for every use, and all its pegs and all the pegs of the court, shall be of bronze.

cnv.text: 會幕中為禮拜用的一切器具和釘子，以及院子裡的一切釘子，都是銅的。

ccb.text: 圣幕里其他一切器具以及圣幕、院子所用的橛子都要用铜制作。
